# Monitoring

## Purpose
Use this skill when analyzing service health signals and baseline behavior.

## Triggers
- "latency spike"
- "error rate increase"
- "resource saturation"
- "health dashboard review"

## Outputs
- Health summary
- Key metric anomalies
- Suspected subsystem
- Suggested next checks

## Example Prompts
- "CPU is at 95 percent on checkout-api. What should I check first?"
- "Summarize the last hour of latency and error anomalies for payments service."
